prose: I cannot report a computed frontier-orbitals result because no chemkit calculation was run: the molecular charge was not confirmed. No HOMO/LUMO/gap number was obtained from the tool, so I will not guess or fabricate one. Requested method parameters were DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), gas phase, multiplicity 2, on `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`; charge remains unspecified. No engine warnings are available because no calculation was launched. Engine integrity.trustworthy verdict: null/not available.
